title: Herbal Green Bean Velveeta
description: This herbal green bean velveeta is an adventurous Ukrainian dish featuring green beans that are simmered to perfection, offering a delicate and comforting flavor profile.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add sliced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Toss in trimmed green beans along with salt to taste. Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes or until they start to soften slightly.
Pour in enough water to cover the vegetables by about an inch. Bring it to a boil then reduce heat to simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add fresh herbs and let them cook together for another minute.
